message.content:
The user wants me to create webpage 2 (page-2.html) and link it back to page 1 (index.html) without breaking page 1. Looking at the existing files: - site/index.html exists with a nav element that is currently empty I need to: 1. Create site/page-2.html with appropriate content 2. Update site/index.html to include a link to page-2.html in the nav element The validators that will run: - page-2-links-index: failure_class=link_integrity - This checks that page 2 links back to index - all-html-parse: failure_class=syntax - This checks that all HTML files are valid Let me create both files properly. { "files": [ { "path": "site/index.html", "content": " My Website
Home Page 2

Welcome

This is the main content of the page.

" }, { "path": "site/page-2.html", "content": " Page 2
Home Page 2

Page 2

This is the second page of the website.

Back to home

" } ], "notes": "Created page-2.html with navigation linking back to index.html, and updated index.html nav with links to both pages." }
